## Description

<!-- Required: what changed, why, and what the user/operator/agent sees differently. -->

## Branch Scope

<!-- Required: review everything currently on this branch, including work you did not author. -->

- [ ] I reviewed all work currently on this branch.
- [ ] I confirmed which branch changes belong in this PR.
- Branch/work reviewed:
  <!-- commits, files, or "single coherent branch" -->
- Included here:
  <!-- all branch changes or the specific scope -->
- Excluded or left for a later PR:
  <!-- use "None" when everything belongs here -->

## PR Shape

<!-- Required: answer yes with rationale. "Already split" and "kept together because..." are both valid. -->

- [ ] I considered whether this work should be split into multiple PRs.
- Rationale:
  <!-- why this PR is the right review unit -->

## Independent Review

<!-- Required: give agents an honest out; the point is to remember the review step, not to get stuck. -->

- [ ] I called a subagent or independent reviewer and incorporated or recorded the result.
- [ ] Not called because this change was narrow/mechanical, no suitable reviewer was available, or this branch already received equivalent review.
- Review notes:
  <!-- who/what reviewed, scope, findings, or rationale for not calling one -->

## Documentation

<!-- Required for every PR. Use "None required" only with a reason. -->

- Documentation updates made:
  <!-- files and why -->
- Documentation considered but not changed:
  <!-- owner docs checked and why no edit was needed -->
- Documentation workflow:
  <!-- Confirm AGENTS.md Documentation workflow was followed, or N/A with reason. -->

## Superseded Docs / Cleanup

<!-- Required: describe cleanup review even when no cleanup was needed. -->

- Superseded or historical docs reviewed:
  <!-- docs/history, old plans, related README/AGENTS guidance, etc. -->
- Cleanup performed:
  <!-- updated, summarized, moved, marked historical, or "None" -->
- Wording/change rationale:
  <!-- justify wording added, moved, trimmed, or left alone -->

## Validation

<!-- Required: list commands/checks. If skipped, explain why. -->

- Checks run:
  <!-- e.g. task check, npm run lint, npm run test:run, git diff --check -->
- Checks skipped:
  <!-- "None" or reason -->

## Risk / Rollback

<!-- Required: summarize what could go wrong and how to undo it. -->

- Risk:
  <!-- Low / Medium / High with reason -->
- Rollback:
  <!-- revert this PR, revert a commit, restore previous wording, etc. -->
